name: Latitude Équateur
classification_notes: The name and available context suggest a geometric or rationalist sans-serif design, consistent with contemporary French type practice at U+270D.
summary: A geometric sans-serif from the French foundry U+270D, produced as part of their academic and experimental type output.
description: Latitude Équateur is a geometric sans-serif typeface from U+270D, the type programme associated with EESAB. The design reflects the rationalist tendencies common to contemporary French type education and practice. Limited information is available from the page, but the work sits within U+270D's broader output of experimental and pedagogical typefaces.
foundry_blurb: Latitude Équateur is presented as a typeface project by U+270D, the type foundry connected to EESAB (École Européenne Supérieure d'Art de Bretagne).

name: Garabosse
classification_notes: Garabosse appears to be an experimental or display interpretation of Garamond-derived forms, likely distorted or redrawn for expressive use, placing it in the display/experimental serif category rather than a conventional text serif.
summary: An experimental display typeface from U+270D that takes Garamond as its starting point and pushes it toward something more expressive and unusual.
description: Produced by U+270D, the type department of the École Européenne Supérieure d'Art de Bretagne, Garabosse reworks Garamond's familiar oldstyle forms into something more wilfully strange. The name itself suggests a playful distortion of the Garamond lineage. Suited to editorial and cultural contexts where a knowing departure from convention is welcome.
foundry_blurb: Garabosse is a typeface project developed at U+270D, the type design programme at EESAB (École Européenne Supérieure d'Art de Bretagne).

name: Louise
classification_notes: Louise appears to be a display typeface with a distinctive decorative character, likely experimental in nature given its context within an art school foundry environment.
summary: A display typeface produced within the U+270D type programme at the École Européenne Supérieure d'Art de Bretagne.
description: Louise is a display typeface developed under the U+270D foundry, the type design programme affiliated with the École Européenne Supérieure d'Art de Bretagne (EESAB). The foundry operates as a student and graduate type initiative, and Louise reflects that experimental, project-based context. Further detail on weights, language support and release year was not available from the page content provided.
foundry_blurb: Louise is a typeface project developed within U+270D, the type foundry associated with the EESAB art school in Brittany, France.

name: Compagnon
classification_notes: Compagnon displays humanist serif characteristics with organic, calligraphic influences typical of type designed within an art school context, combining hand-drawn qualities with structured letterforms.
summary: A humanist serif developed at the EESAB art school in France, combining calligraphic warmth with structured letterforms across three weights.
description: Designed and published through the U+270D type programme at EESAB, Compagnon draws on humanist and calligraphic traditions to produce a serif suited to editorial and body text use. The family runs across three weights, each with matching italics, giving it reasonable range for continuous reading. Its hand-drawn quality sets it apart from more mechanical serifs, lending a personal character to the forms.
foundry_blurb: Compagnon is a typeface produced through the U+270D programme at the École Européenne Supérieure d'Art de Bretagne, reflecting the school's engagement with type design as both a craft and a discipline.

name: Pasteur
classification_notes: The page presents a serif typeface with classical proportions and transitional characteristics, balancing humanist influences with more rational stroke contrast typical of the transitional model.
summary: A transitional serif from the U+270D student foundry, designed for text setting with classical proportions.
description: Pasteur is a transitional serif produced under the U+270D foundry, the type design programme at EESAB. It draws on the conventions of classical text typefaces, with measured stroke contrast and considered letterform construction. The design sits comfortably in book and editorial contexts where legibility at running text sizes is the primary concern.
foundry_blurb: Pasteur is a typeface project from U+270D, the type foundry associated with the École Européenne Supérieure d'Art de Bretagne (EESAB).

name: Director
classification_notes: Director appears to be a display-oriented serif with strong contrast and expressive character, suited to editorial and headline use rather than continuous text.
summary: A display serif from U+270D with strong character intended for headline and editorial contexts.
description: Director is a display serif designed for use at large sizes, where its personality and contrast can be read clearly. The typeface comes from U+270D, the type foundry associated with EESAB, a French art and design school. Its single weight suits headline, poster and editorial applications where a direct, confident voice is needed.
foundry_blurb: Director is presented by U+270D as a display typeface, designed for expressive use in editorial and headline settings.

name: FT 88
classification_notes: FT 88 is a geometric display typeface with strong constructed letterforms suited to headlines and large-scale use, placing it firmly in the display category.
summary: A geometric display typeface from U+270D, the type foundry associated with EESAB, built for headline and large-scale typographic use.
description: FT 88 is a constructed geometric display face produced by U+270D, the foundry operating out of EESAB. Its letterforms are suited to headlines and poster-scale work where strong geometry and clarity at large sizes are required. The page provides limited detail on weights or language support beyond standard Latin.
foundry_blurb: FT 88 is presented as a display typeface project by U+270D, the foundry associated with EESAB, intended for large-scale typographic applications.

name: Venus
classification_notes: Venus appears to be a display-oriented serif with expressive, decorative qualities suited to large-scale use, placing it in the display serif subcategory.
summary: A display serif from the U+270D student foundry at EESAB, designed for expressive large-scale typesetting.
description: Venus is a display serif typeface produced under the U+270D foundry, associated with the École Européenne Supérieure d'Art de Bretagne. It is designed with an expressive character suited to editorial and poster contexts. Limited information is available about its full range of styles or language support.
foundry_blurb: Venus is presented as a typeface project from U+270D, the type foundry of EESAB.

name: Abordage
classification_notes: The name and foundry context suggest a display typeface with blackletter or aggressive nautical-themed characteristics, though the page content provided is minimal. Classified as display based on available context.
summary: A display typeface produced at the U+270D type school in France, with an aggressive graphic character suited to editorial and poster work.
description: Abordage is a student or faculty project from U+270D, the type design programme at EESAB in France. The name, meaning 'boarding' in French, suggests a forceful, confrontational character typical of display work with blackletter or aggressive graphic influences.
